## Change

Describe the interoperability or implementation outcome.

## Compatibility

- [ ] No normative effect
- [ ] Backward-compatible normative addition
- [ ] Breaking change with an explicitly versioned profile

## Evidence

- [ ] Positive and negative fixtures added or not applicable
- [ ] Python tests pass
- [ ] Independent TypeScript tests pass
- [ ] Generated fixtures and indexes are current
- [ ] Version, schemas, skill reference, and changelog updated where applicable
